clause: Layering: moving proceeds through intermediaries to disguise origin is the laundering process defined in s.3
citation: Fan-in pattern of 6 sub-threshold credits consolidated to a single mule beneficiary is consistent with the layering process; supports an STR under PML Rule 3(1)(D).

clause: A series of integrally-connected transactions each below Rs 10 lakh within a month whose aggregate exceeds Rs 10 lakh must be recorded
citation: Five transfers of Rs 49,000 to the same beneficiary within one week sit just below the reporting threshold, indicating deliberate structuring.

clause: Outward remittance under LRS is capped at USD 250,000 per resident individual per financial year under FEMA s.5
citation: Cumulative YTD outward remittances for this PAN, aggregated across rails, push utilisation past the LRS ceiling on this leg.

clause: All suspicious transactions, whether or not in cash, must be recorded; a watchlist hit is a primary ground of suspicion
citation: Receiver CIN matches an entity on the RBI Wilful Defaulters list; deterministic watchlist hit corroborated by exact CIN.
